title: Authentication, Authorization, Tenant Isolation, and Privacy · Go Scenario Checkpoint
summary: A release reviewer compares near-miss Go decisions for authentication, authorization, tenant isolation, and privacy and accepts only runnable changed-case evidence, explicit non-claims, and named browser, compiler, network, XML, PostgreSQL, race, load, accessibility, deployment, and production transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for tenant-safe identity and privacy boundary. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice,…
objectives: Verify configured token issuer, audience, algorithm, time, key rotation, and transport before constructing a minimal principal.
Authorize each command from principal, tenant, role, ownership, relationship, and current resource state inside the application boundary.
Require tenant scope in repository APIs, SQL predicates, unique keys, tests, metrics, exports, and administrative paths.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Feed Go Audit Redaction
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz Go team handles case 3170 during a cross-tenant privacy audit. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove verified identity, resource authorization, tenant query scope, privacy, and redacted audit evidence; browser Go must remain deterministic and free of network, database, process, and host effects; then change one artifact, deployment, incident, backup, restore, rollback, or capacity condition and reconcile the release. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Record actor, decision, resource, outcome, and correlation evidence while redacting tokens, feed content, private URLs, SQL, and sensitive queries.

The visible result looks correct, but its invariant or value contract is unverified. What must happen next?

Evidence target: Feed aggregation and Go Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Feed Go Audit Redaction.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for record actor, decision, resource, outcome, and correlation evidence while redacting tokens, feed content, private urls, sql, and sensitive queries. For Feed aggregation and Go Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Feed Go Audit Redaction, keep Feed Go Audit Redaction connected to executable Go feed, XML, HTTP, PostgreSQL, schedule, API, reader, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.
